usage: Visual style presets are lightweight look cards for storyboard image prompts and video prompts. They are not full director templates.

presets.short_description: Large-format cinema realism with broad dynamic range, tactile detail, and majestic lens presence.
presets.art_direction: epic but restrained, premium, emotionally grounded
presets.color_palette: natural color with controlled contrast, clean highlights, deep but readable shadows
presets.lighting: motivated cinematic light, strong depth cues, atmospheric backlight when appropriate
presets.texture: fine film grain, lens falloff, tactile surfaces, realistic skin and material response
presets.camera_language: 70mm large-format feel, composed wides, confident push-ins, shallow depth when motivated
storyboard_prompt_rules: Use large-format cinematic realism and physically plausible light.
Keep compositions premium, spacious, and legible.
Favor lens depth, atmospheric scale, and tactile production design.
video_prompt_rules: Describe camera movement as grounded and cinematic, not chaotic.
Keep motion physically plausible and preserve the locked lighting and lens language.

presets.short_description: Clean premium advertising realism for products, lifestyle, food, beauty, and conversion-led films.
presets.color_palette: brand-friendly palette, clear product color, gentle contrast, controlled whites
presets.lighting: softbox, rim light, specular product highlights, clean shadow control
presets.texture: high-resolution product materials, skin, fabric, condensation, glass, metal, food texture
presets.camera_language: macro inserts, hero product angles, smooth slider moves, controlled depth of field
storyboard_prompt_rules: Prioritize product readability, clean surfaces, and premium commercial lighting.
Use macro detail shots and hero compositions when the product is the memory anchor.
Keep the image uncluttered enough for quick scanning.
video_prompt_rules: Describe smooth camera moves and product-safe continuity.
Keep the product shape, color, material, label policy, and scale consistent.

presets.short_description: Mythic Chinese-inspired fantasy realism with mist, jade light, silk, mountains, and spiritual scale.
presets.color_palette: jade, ink black, moon white, warm gold accents, restrained saturation
presets.lighting: misty volumetric light, lantern glow, moonlight, layered atmospheric depth
presets.texture: silk, stone, mist, water, carved metal, lacquer, ancient paper
presets.camera_language: floating crane moves, slow reveals, layered depth, painterly wides
storyboard_prompt_rules: Use Chinese-inspired fantasy atmosphere without copying protected characters or existing IP.
Emphasize mist layers, ceremonial texture, and elegant scale.
Keep costumes, architecture, and symbols original to the project.
video_prompt_rules: Use graceful camera motion, reveal structure, and atmospheric transitions.
Avoid overcrowding the frame with random symbols.

presets.short_description: Ultra-clean 3D render realism for premium objects, architecture, technology, and impossible camera moves.
presets.color_palette: controlled neutrals with brand accent color, high clarity, clean gradients
presets.lighting: global illumination, soft reflections, precise rim lights, studio environment
presets.texture: glass, anodized metal, ceramic, carbon fiber, micro-scratches, product finishes
presets.camera_language: smooth orbit, exploded view, macro glide, impossible but elegant product moves
storyboard_prompt_rules: Use high-end 3D rendering language with believable materials and reflections.
Keep object geometry clean and consistent across frames.
Use negative space and controlled highlights for premium product reading.
video_prompt_rules: Use smooth product motion and precise mechanical reveals.
Avoid physically confusing transformations unless the concept explicitly calls for them.

presets.short_description: Flat but sophisticated 2D editorial graphics with bold composition and readable visual hierarchy.
presets.color_palette: limited palette, confident contrast, clean background fields
presets.lighting: flat design lighting with selective shadow or paper depth
presets.texture: paper grain, vector shapes, subtle print texture, clean iconography
presets.camera_language: layout transitions, panel reveals, clean graphic motion, readable hierarchy
storyboard_prompt_rules: Use a coherent 2D editorial visual system with clear hierarchy.
Keep shapes, symbols, and visual metaphors simple enough to read quickly.
Avoid faux UI clutter unless the project is actually interface-driven.
video_prompt_rules: Use concise graphic motion and readable transitions.
Keep generated text out unless exact on-screen text is explicitly approved.

presets.short_description: Warm illustrated storybook mood with handmade texture, gentle emotion, and soft cinematic framing.
presets.color_palette: soft warm palette with natural greens, sky blues, muted reds, and creamy highlights
presets.lighting: gentle daylight, sunset glow, soft window light
presets.texture: watercolor wash, pencil edge, paper grain, hand-painted imperfections
presets.camera_language: gentle pans, simple reveals, cozy wide-to-medium compositions
storyboard_prompt_rules: Use original storybook illustration traits without naming or copying a specific artist or studio.
Keep characters appealing but not franchise-like.
Emphasize readable emotion and soft atmosphere.
video_prompt_rules: Use gentle motion, simple staging, and emotionally clear actions.
Preserve character silhouettes and palette continuity.

presets.short_description: Original cinematic anime look with luminous skies, emotional lighting, and crisp environmental detail.
presets.color_palette: clear sky color, luminous highlights, warm-cool contrast, restrained bloom
presets.lighting: sunset, rain reflection, window light, sky glow, rim-lit silhouettes
presets.texture: clean linework, detailed backgrounds, atmospheric particles, reflective ground
presets.camera_language: wide emotional establishing shots, stillness-to-motion, parallax depth
storyboard_prompt_rules: Use original cinematic anime traits without naming or copying a specific living artist or studio.
Emphasize light, weather, emotional distance, and detailed environments.
Keep character designs original and consistent.
video_prompt_rules: Use graceful camera motion, weather detail, and emotional timing.
Avoid accidental captions, lyrics, school names, or brand marks.

presets.short_description: Dark high-contrast noir mood with sculptural shadows, rain, metal, glass, and moral tension.
presets.medium: cinematic noir live-action or stylized realism
presets.color_palette: black, charcoal, silver, cold blue, occasional red or gold accent
presets.lighting: hard key light, venetian shadows, rain reflections, silhouette, low-key contrast
presets.texture: wet pavement, smoke, glass, leather, metal, old stone
presets.camera_language: slow tracking, tight closeups, diagonal compositions, negative space
storyboard_prompt_rules: Use contrast and shadow as the main visual language.
Keep accent colors rare and intentional.
Preserve readable faces or products despite low-key lighting.
video_prompt_rules: Use deliberate camera moves and slow tension-building action.
Avoid making the image so dark that the subject becomes unreadable.

presets.short_description: Clean future-tech realism with luminous interfaces, precision materials, and restrained sci-fi polish.
presets.color_palette: deep neutral base, white light, cyan or electric accent, controlled gradients
presets.lighting: soft luminous panels, rim light, dark-mode clarity, glass reflections
presets.texture: glass, holographic surfaces, brushed metal, clean polymer, UI glow
presets.camera_language: smooth dolly, macro interface detail, elegant reveal, controlled parallax
storyboard_prompt_rules: Use future-tech polish without cluttering the frame with unreadable UI.
Keep interface text absent unless exact approved text is provided.
Use luminous accents and precision materials to communicate intelligence.
video_prompt_rules: Use smooth motion, clean reveals, and controlled light animation.
Do not generate fake dashboards, random numbers, or accidental brand marks.
